title: Dragonet

{{Quote|Folks say those dragonets are young krayt dragons. Don't know about that, but be careful anyway.|[[Pfilbee Jhorn]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:PJ">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Pfilbee Jhorn|Tatooine}}</ref>}}
'''Dragonets''' were [[Reptile/Legends|reptile]] creatures native to the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="SWG" /> Sometimes compared to young [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragons]],<ref name="SWG:PJ" /> they were often found in lairs made of bones.<ref name="SWG" />

==History==
{{Quote|Dragonet flank steaks are the main course. Their meat is so succulent! Yes. Flanks. Dragonet flanks.|[[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:JPP">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Jabba's Palace : Porcellus|Tatooine}}</ref>}}
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] cook, [[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]], used to cook dragonet flanks for his master.<ref name="SWG:JPP" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Janitor/Legends|Custodial Officer]] [[Pfilbee Jhorn]] tasked a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to eliminate dragonets prowling around the [[Garbage compactor/Legends|trash compactors]] in [[Bestine (city)/Legends|Bestine]].<ref name="SWG:PJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dragonets appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> In the game, the dragonets had the same appearance than the [[Dune lizard/Legends|dune lizards]], the [[Scyk/Legends|scyks]] and the [[Rill (species)|rills]].<ref name="SWG" />
